created_from.commit_subject: Refine SNAP self-employment and expense deductions

seeded_from.notes: Manual federal SNAP allotment cleanup: keep the expected contribution as the exact 30 percent helper, round the reduced allotment down at the full-month allotment stage, and make the one- and two-person minimum use explicit half-up rounding instead of Python's banker's rounding.
